final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing editorial photo of a Korean café-style coffee and dessert scene for Instagram, smartphone-captured aesthetic.

Style/medium: smartphone photography, Korean café aesthetic, editorial food photography with hand-drawn annotation overlay, casual Instagram story style
Composition: top-down 45-degree angle, shallow depth of field, coffee cup and dessert as hero subjects, negative space for annotations
Subject: iced latte in a clear glass with visible layers, flaky croissant or Korean-style cake on ceramic plate, no people
Scene/backdrop: minimalist Korean café interior, light wood table surface, soft natural window light, blurred background
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight from window, bright and airy, relaxed and stylish atmosphere
Color palette: warm beige and cream tones as base, coffee brown as anchor, soft pink or mint accents from café decor
Materials/textures: visible ice cubes, flaky pastry layers, ceramic glaze, wood grain
Text (verbatim): "【描写规则】・像用白色笔画出那样的细手绘线条・一笔写成风格的粗糙、略微不均匀・像描摹物体外周那样添加轮廓线・用箭头或虚线制造视线引导"
Constraints: hand-drawn white line annotations in Japanese (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji), short diary-style comments on taste/texture/mood, decorative elements (steam, sparkles, hearts) with intentional white space, magazine rough-note aesthetic
Avoid: stock photo look, over-processed HDR, cluttered composition, watermark, 8K stuffer words
